name: Dev Tools
description: Run project development commands with sensible auto-detection: tests (pytest / cargo test / pnpm-or-npm test), linters (ruff / eslint / cargo clippy), formatters (ruff format / prettier / cargo fmt), plus inspect_build_errors which runs any build command and parses rustc, pytest, and tsc/eslint-style output into a structured error list. Commands run via the shell with a sanitized environment, capped output, and timeouts. REQUIRES user approval before each call — these run arbitrary project commands.
